title: Founding AE
descriptionhtml:
Who We Are

Sapien is rethinking how finance teams operate in the age of AI. We’re building toward an autonomous CFO—systems that run company financials end-to-end. Our platform analyzes complex financial data in real time to increase decision cadence, prevent costly mistakes, and surface value. Sapien has caught multi-million-dollar errors, saved thousands of jobs, and returned significant dollars to customers’ bottom lines.

We partner with traditional businesses—manufacturing, healthcare, restaurants, and large enterprises—to deeply understand and automate their financial workflows. We’re HQ’d by Madison Square Park in NYC and backed by General Catalyst, Neo, and top operators from Google, OpenAI, Microsoft, Ramp, and Stripe (over $9M raised).

The Role

We're hiring our Founding AE to own deals end-to-end and help scale Sapien's revenue engine from the ground up. You'll run full-cycle sales from first conversation through close while helping shape our narrative, outbound strategy, and enterprise sales motion.

You'll work directly with the executive team to turn early traction into a repeatable, scalable sales motion. This means running discovery, demos, pilots, and negotiations, closing customers, and helping define how Sapien sells—from pricing and packaging to sales process and playbooks.

What You'll Do

Sales Execution

  • Own the full sales cycle from first meeting through close.
  • Run discovery, demos, pilots, and commercial conversations with finance and analytics leaders.
  • Manage pipeline and forecast revenue. You own deals and revenue outcomes.

GTM & Sales Motion

  • Help define Sapien’s sales process, pricing, packaging, and sales materials.
  • Partner with founders on positioning, messaging, and narrative.
  • Work with pipeline generation efforts (outbound, events, content) to ensure strong pipeline quality and conversion.

Customer & Market Insight

  • Develop deep expertise in finance and analytics workflows and the modern finance tech stack.
  • Feed structured market insight back to engineering, product, and leadership (what's resonating, objections, pricing feedback, and product gaps).
  • Help turn early customers into references, case studies, and expansion opportunities

How You Work (values We Care About)

  • AI-native. You’re energized by applying AI to transform how businesses run.
  • Ambiguity-shaping. You turn nebulous problems into a first pass and drive to resolution.
  • Extreme ownership. You identify what’s next—and do it. If you say it, it gets done.
  • Speed & hustle. You bias to action and move with urgency without sacrificing quality.

Compensation Range: $100K - $150K

reason: The role involves full-cycle sales including negotiation and enterprise-level engagement, qualifying it as an enterprise sales position.
fit_explanation: This job is a good fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their current focus on building AI systems for B2B applications, which aligns well with Sapien's mission of leveraging AI to enhance financial operations. title: Founding Account Executive | Remote - £55-80k base DOE + Commission & Equity
companyindustry: Software Development, IT Services and IT Consulting, and Technology, Information and Internet
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive - UK Remote | £55-80K base + uncapped commission + equity


The cold email infrastructure space is having a moment - and our client has the platform that's quietly powering deliverability for everyone from solo operators to NASDAQ-listed SaaS companies.


They're profitable. Founder-led. Global from day one (US, India, France, Middle East). Sub-20 team in Paris.


Now they're hiring their first full-cycle salesperson.


What you'll actually do:

You're not inheriting a pipeline. You're building it.

Two motions, both yours end-to-end:


→ End-user deals - demos and close with sales teams and lead gen agencies, from solo operators to enterprise.

→ Platform partnerships - longer, higher-value cycles with the SalesLofts, Lemlists, and Apollos of the world.


You'll report directly to the CEO. No SDRs to lean on, no RevOps to build your sequences - just you, the product, and a market that's already buying.


What they need:

Hunter. You write the cold email, make the call, and generate your own pipeline.

Startup-proven. You've worked sub-20, or built something yourself. You don't need a playbook. Full-cycle SaaS sales experience - comfortable across SMB velocity and enterprise patience.

Global mindset. Comfortable selling into the US and Europe, not just the UK.

Native or near-native English (non-negotiable).

Bonus: sales tech/outbound/MarTech background (Apollo, Lemlist, Gong, Clay, SalesLoft).


The package:

£55-80K base + uncapped commission, meaningful equity, full autonomy to shape the GTM motion, and occasional trips to Paris HQ.

This is a founding sales seat at a company that's already winning. You're accelerating the engine, not starting it.


DM me or apply via the link for a confidential chat.

title: Founding Account Executive | SaaS | Martech | AI | 60M Series A |
companyindustry: Software Development and IT System Custom Software Development
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive, EMEA

📍 London (Hybrid)

💰 £160k–£220k OTE (50/50 split) + Equity


There are not many opportunities where you can join an AI company this early, build an entire region from scratch, and do it at a business that’s already scaling at an insane pace.

This is one of them.


An AI software company operating in the AI search / content visibility space is hiring its first commercial hires in Europe. They help brands improve how they appear inside tools like ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity — a huge shift that’s changing how companies think about SEO, content and customer acquisition.


The growth is what really stands out:

  • Grew from ~$3M → ~$15M → nearly ~$20M ARR in a very short period
  • Targeting ~$60M ARR next
  • Team scaled from ~40 → 150 people YoY
  • Raised a major Series B from top-tier investors
  • Already generating meaningful European revenue without a local sales team
  • US sales team massively outperforming — majority of reps over target, multiple at 150-200%+


🏋️ What you’ll do

  • Be one of the first GTM hires in EMEA
  • Own the full sales cycle from outbound through close
  • Sell into Mid-Market and Enterprise companies
  • Typical buyers: CMOs, VP Marketing, senior commercial stakeholders
  • Build pipeline, close deals and help shape the EMEA GTM motion
  • Work directly with US leadership while operating with high autonomy
  • Help lay the foundations for the future EMEA team


🔍 What they’re looking for

  • 3-7 years of B2B SaaS closing experience
  • Strong hunter mentality and ability to self-source pipeline
  • Proven top performer (President’s Club / consistent overachievement)
  • Experience selling to senior stakeholders
  • Someone comfortable in fast-moving, early stage, high-growth environments
  • High ownership, strong communication and genuine builder mentality


Nice to have:

  • AI / Martech / SEO / data platform exposure
  • Startup or founding AE experience
  • Additional European languages


🚀 Why this is interesting

This is not joining a slow-moving enterprise business with layers of process already built.

It’s joining a company that already has serious momentum, in one of the hottest areas in AI right now, at the exact point they’re starting to scale internationally.


For the right person, this is the kind of role that can completely accelerate a career.

  • Strong hunter mentality and ability to self-source pipeline
  • Proven top performer (President’s Club / consistent overachievement)
  • Experience selling to senior stakeholders
  • Someone comfortable in fast-moving, early stage, high-growth environments
  • High ownership, strong communication and genuine builder mentality


Nice to have:

  • AI / Martech / SEO / data platform exposure
  • Startup or founding AE experience
  • Additional European languages


🚀 Why this is interesting

This is not joining a slow-moving enterprise business with layers of process already built.

It’s joining a company that already has serious momentum, in one of the hottest areas in AI right now, at the exact point they’re starting to scale internationally.


For the right person, this is the kind of role that can completely accelerate a career.
reason: This position involves handling full sales cycles targeting mid-market and enterprise clients, qualifying it as an enterprise role.
fit_explanation: This job is a good fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their current focus on building AI systems for B2B sales, which aligns well with Bluebird's emphasis on AI in the Martech space. The candidate's proven ability to build go-to-market strategies and scale operations across multiple regions complements the role's requirement to establish a new commercial presence in Europe. However, the candidate may need to familiarize themselves with the specific nuances of AI search and content visibility, which could be a slight gap in their domain expertise.

title: Founding Sales Lead
descriptionhtml:
Founding Sales Lead

Location: London hybrid ·

Contract: Full-time permanent

Reports to: Venture MD


Cera is Europe's largest HealthTech company — $500m in revenue, 10,000+ carers and nurses, 2.5 million patient visits a month. We've built the largest home healthcare dataset in Europe and used it to reduce hospitalisations by up to 70%, saving the NHS more than £1bn.

Now we're backing something new. One of the ventures in our portfolio is building an AI-powered platform that's already transforming how frontline workforces are managed. We have a suite of AI agents that are live, in production, growing 40% month on month with a pipeline of mid-to-enterprise deals.


We can't say much more here. What we can say: this is a first sales hire role, working directly with the MD of the venture, with the full backing and infrastructure of Cera behind it. You'll own the commercial engine end to end — first outreach to signed contract, positioning to pricing, CRM to forecast — and build the sales function around you.

This is a career maker. We're already hiring the next two commercial heads — you'll help pick them and set the standard they work to.


If that sounds like too many hats, this isn't for you. If it sounds like the role you've been waiting for, keep reading.


What you'll do:

  • Split the book with the Venture MD — take on as much as you can land
  • Run the full sales cycle: outbound, discovery, pilots, procurement, close
  • Build the playbook: messaging, pricing, objection handling, forecasting
  • Shape the product with engineering — you're the bridge from customer to dev
  • Design pilots that prove ROI, then convert them to contracts
  • Lay the foundation for a sales function others will join — then hire them


About You:

  • 5+ years in B2B SaaS sales, ideally health-tech, HR/recruitment tech, or workforce platforms
  • You have successful founding AE experience in a B2B startup, or top revenue maker in a B2B scale-up
  • You're a hunter — confident self-sourcing pipeline, not waiting for leads
  • You've built from nothing before, not just inherited a book
  • Strong on consultative selling, ROI storytelling, and navigating complex procurement
  • Comfortable in ambiguity, energised by ownership
  • Based in the UK with ability to be in London regularly


Desirable:

  • Sold into care providers, staffing or recruitment companies, or complex regulated environments
  • Selling AI features or products
  • You have been, worked closely with, or sold to recruitment or HR professionals


The UK's health sector is in a workforce crisis. We're fixing it. Come sell something that actually matters — backed by the company that's already changed how Britain does care.

title: Founding Account Executive, Userled - Welcome to the Jungle | Login
description_text: Userled Founding Account Executive | Welcome to the Jungle (formerly Otta) Founding Account Executive , Userled EMEA and/or US focused Sales £130 - 160k OTE £65 - 80k BASE + 0.3%-0.4% Equity Mid and Senior level London 3+ days a week in office (Shoreditch, London) Copilot for enterprise marketing teams Job no longer available Copilot for enterprise marketing teams 21-100 employees B2B Marketing SaaS Automation Job no longer available £130 - 160k OTE £65 - 80k BASE + 0.3%-0.4% Equity Mid and Senior level London 3+ days a week in office (Shoreditch, London) 21-100 employees B2B Marketing SaaS Automation Company mission To become the first one-stop-shop for revenue teams. Job Company Role Who you are You have a strong B2B sales record & you want to build a SaaS sales function from the ground up You are happy to build your own pipeline and don't mind doing the hard things You can manage complex sales cycles with the world’s leading mid-market and enterprise B2B Tech businesses (~300-10k+ employees), initially securing mid-five and low-six figure deals You are a master of Discovery calls and love getting to the root of the problem to build rock solid business cases You are go-getter, work fast and are comfortable with lots of autonomy, but are still a team player You’re happy to execute day-to-day sales and close deals alongside your other responsibilities. You’ll be part of a lean team, and this is not the role for you if you only want to work on strategy & management Background in closing deals for at least 3 years You are happy making high-impact decisions with imperfect information You are highly motivated and willing to learn about the space we operate in and the businesses we sell to What the job involves You’ll be the second 'quota-carrier' at one of Europe’s most promising early-stage companies working alongside an experienced team who have done this before & worked with the best investors and teams out there You’ll build & manage our sales pipeline, close deals, and partner with our CEO on GTM strategy as we expand our ideal customer profile & find success in other sectors and geographies…hopefully, you’ll manage a geography/sector/team in the next 12 months You will be working closely with the CEO to build out the sales function, while shaping our go-to-market strategy and executing on it This role will report directly to the CEO, and you'll have the opportunity to establish yourself as a Sales leader at Userled As Userled scales its GTM function, you’ll have an outsized impact on the business either bringing in the largest, most strategic customers or building out future teams as we expand globally. We operate as a meritocracy & there are no limits to your growth Application process Apply with your profile Video call with Liam (BizOps) Task: Discovery call Task: Demo Offer Salary benchmarks Our take Digital marketing mainly relies on finding, selecting and reviewing ad keywords in the hope of capturing attention, but even when this approach does pique someone's curiosity enough to click on a link it usually redirects them to a bland, one-size-fits-all website. Userled exists to make sure this marketing spend isn't wasted using templates to generate personalised websites based on each individual marketing campaign. Userled approaches this with a streamlined no-code product, allowing marketing teams to construct customer journeys that greatly increase conversion rates and allow companies to provide a more personal and relevant experience for their communities. The platform helps businesses reduce the delivery time of buyer experiences, enabling the creation of swift and impactful engagement strategies while monitoring the impact of personalisation on their pipeline seamlessly. With Google and Apple announcing the deprecation of 3rd party cookies, a market downturn & increased focus on capital efficiency make Userled even more vital a tool for companies. It has grown a respectable client base including the likes of Firebolt and Vanta. With funding to its name, the next steps for the company include continued hiring to build upon its marketing technology products. Steph Company Specialist at Welcome to the Jungle Company Funding ( 1 round ) Aug 2024 $5.5m Early VC Total funding: $5.5m Company benefits 25 day holiday plus bank holidays to relax and fuel up! Apple hardware Monthly socials in London Team off-site in fun places! (We've been to Bath, Lancaster & Corfu so far) Enhanced parental leave A cool office in central London (Shoreditch/Old Street) with access to a private gym! Company HQ London, UK Leadership Yann Sarfati (Co-Founder & CEO) Former Head of Sales at incident.io. Co-founder and former CEO of Revive. Previously Enterprise Sales Manager, Analytics at Salesforce. Co-founded Eliott. Tristan Saunders (Co-Founder & CTO) Former Lead Software Engineer at nate. Previously Tech Lead at American Express. Co-founder and former CTO of Revive. Share this job Save

title: Account Executive
descriptionhtml:
Account Executive (SaaS & Creator Economy)


Our client is a profitable, founder-led powerhouse with a decade of dominance in the influencer marketing space. Having built long-term partnerships with global giants like H&M, SharkNinja, and Coty, they are now transitioning into a high-growth "zero-to-one" phase.


They are launching an AI-native, subscription-based enterprise platform that leverages ten years of proprietary data. This is a rare opportunity to join a business that combines the agility of a startup with the established credibility, customer base, and commercial foundation of an industry leader.


🎯 The Opportunity

As an Account Executive, you will be at the forefront of this evolution. You will own the full sales cycle, helping sophisticated global brands navigate the creator economy through a blend of cutting-edge technology and deep category expertise.

This is a highly strategic, consultative role designed for a closer who can navigate complex enterprise environments and pitch bold, performance-driven solutions.


🛠️ Your Responsibilities

  • Full-Cycle Sales Mastery: Lead enterprise-level conversations from initial prospecting through to high-stakes negotiation and closing.
  • Strategic Pipeline Building: Identify and penetrate key verticals including Fashion, Luxury, Beauty, Tech, DTC, CPG, and Finance.
  • Consultative Solution Design: Uncover complex challenges within brand marketing and media teams, positioning the platform as the essential strategic solution.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Strategy, Product, and Paid Media teams to build data-backed, enterprise-ready proposals.
  • Revenue Ownership: Maintain an accurate CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce) and consistently meet or exceed revenue targets.
  • Industry Thought Leadership: Represent the brand at industry events and act as a trusted advisor to major CMOs and marketing heads.


✅ Requirements

  • Experience: 2–5 years in consultative or enterprise sales, specifically within an influencer marketing agency, SaaS platform, or high-growth tech startup.
  • Track Record: Proven success closing mid-to-large deals with enterprise-level marketing teams.
  • Communication: Exceptional storytelling and presentation skills; you are comfortable and confident owning a boardroom.
  • Mindset: A self-starter with a "growth mindset" who thrives in a remote-first, fast-paced environment.


💥 Bonus Points

  • Experience specifically within an influencer/creator marketing agency.
  • AI Adopter: You naturally use AI tools to streamline your workflow and sales process.
  • Experience scaling enterprise partnerships within a rapidly growing company.


📦 What’s in it for you?

  • Generous PTO: 25 days holiday + Bank Holidays, plus 4 "Company Days," 3 Wellness Days, and paid sick leave.
  • Continuous Growth: An annual L&D budget dedicated to your professional development.
  • Financial Reward: Competitive base salary + an annual bonus scheme recognizing top performance.
  • Health & Wellness: Healthcare stipend provided for US-based employees.

description_html:
Account Executive (SaaS & Creator Economy)


Our client is a profitable, founder-led powerhouse with a decade of dominance in the influencer marketing space. Having built long-term partnerships with global giants like H&M, SharkNinja, and Coty, they are now transitioning into a high-growth "zero-to-one" phase.


They are launching an AI-native, subscription-based enterprise platform that leverages ten years of proprietary data. This is a rare opportunity to join a business that combines the agility of a startup with the established credibility, customer base, and commercial foundation of an industry leader.


🎯 The Opportunity

As an Account Executive, you will be at the forefront of this evolution. You will own the full sales cycle, helping sophisticated global brands navigate the creator economy through a blend of cutting-edge technology and deep category expertise.

This is a highly strategic, consultative role designed for a closer who can navigate complex enterprise environments and pitch bold, performance-driven solutions.


🛠️ Your Responsibilities

  • Full-Cycle Sales Mastery: Lead enterprise-level conversations from initial prospecting through to high-stakes negotiation and closing.
  • Strategic Pipeline Building: Identify and penetrate key verticals including Fashion, Luxury, Beauty, Tech, DTC, CPG, and Finance.
  • Consultative Solution Design: Uncover complex challenges within brand marketing and media teams, positioning the platform as the essential strategic solution.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Strategy, Product, and Paid Media teams to build data-backed, enterprise-ready proposals.
  • Revenue Ownership: Maintain an accurate CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce) and consistently meet or exceed revenue targets.
  • Industry Thought Leadership: Represent the brand at industry events and act as a trusted advisor to major CMOs and marketing heads.


✅ Requirements

  • Experience: 2–5 years in consultative or enterprise sales, specifically within an influencer marketing agency, SaaS platform, or high-growth tech startup.
  • Track Record: Proven success closing mid-to-large deals with enterprise-level marketing teams.
  • Communication: Exceptional storytelling and presentation skills; you are comfortable and confident owning a boardroom.
  • Mindset: A self-starter with a "growth mindset" who thrives in a remote-first, fast-paced environment.


💥 Bonus Points

  • Experience specifically within an influencer/creator marketing agency.
  • AI Adopter: You naturally use AI tools to streamline your workflow and sales process.
  • Experience scaling enterprise partnerships within a rapidly growing company.


📦 What’s in it for you?

  • Generous PTO: 25 days holiday + Bank Holidays, plus 4 "Company Days," 3 Wellness Days, and paid sick leave.
  • Continuous Growth: An annual L&D budget dedicated to your professional development.
  • Financial Reward: Competitive base salary + an annual bonus scheme recognizing top performance.
  • Health & Wellness: Healthcare stipend provided for US-based employees.
reason: The role involves full-cycle enterprise sales, targeting global brands, thus qualifying it as a relevant B2B/enterprise sales position.
fit_explanation: This job is a good fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their current focus on AI systems, which aligns well with Propel's transition into an AI-native platform. The candidate's proven ability to build go-to-market strategies and scale partner ecosystems will be valuable in the high-growth phase of the company. However, there may be a gap in specific experience with influencer marketing and the SaaS model, which could require some adjustment for the candidate to fully adapt to Propel's unique market dynamics.

title: LiveFlow Commercial Account Executive | Welcome to the Jungle ...
description_text: LiveFlow Commercial Account Executive | Welcome to the Jungle (formerly Otta) Commercial Account Executive , LiveFlow $91 - 180k OTE $90k BASE + Equity. Uncapped commission structure NetSuite Quickbooks Junior and Mid level New York The £1 platform for multi-entity finance Job no longer available The £1 platform for multi-entity finance 21-100 employees Fintech B2C Personal finance Financial Services SaaS Accounting Data Integration Job no longer available $91 - 180k OTE $90k BASE + Equity. Uncapped commission structure NetSuite Quickbooks Junior and Mid level New York 21-100 employees Fintech B2C Personal finance Financial Services SaaS Accounting Data Integration Company mission To empower people to build their own financial platforms for better efficiency and clarity. Job Company Role Who you are You have 2+ years of Account Executive experience selling B2B SaaS You’ve worked at an early-stage startup or in a highly unstructured environment You’re comfortable selling a product that’s constantly evolving You thrive in ambiguity and don’t need everything figured out to take action You’re deeply curious, ask great questions, and have a strong growth mindset You take ownership, move fast, and bias toward learning by doing You’re excited by the idea of helping define how a product is sold, not just executing a playbook Desirable Experience selling into finance, accounting, or operations teams Experience with QuickBooks, NetSuite, or similar ERP systems Previous founding AE or 0 → 1 sales experience Comfort working closely with product and engineering teams What the job involves We’re hiring an Account Executive to help launch and define the go-to-market motion for LiveFlow’s new AI ERP This is not a standard, scaled AE role. You’ll be one of the first sellers on a brand-new product, operating in true 0 → 1 territory. You’ll work closely with founders, product, and engineering to shape messaging, identify the right customers, and turn early learnings into repeatable motion If you thrive in ambiguity, enjoy building from scratch, and want real ownership over how a product goes to market, this role is for you Own the full sales cycle for LiveFlow’s AI ERP, from first conversation to close Help define our ICP, buyer personas, positioning, and core messaging Run early discovery calls to deeply understand customer pain points and workflows Experiment with pricing, deal structure, and sales motion for $30k–$60k deals Work directly with founders and product to influence roadmap based on real customer feedback Turn chaos into clarity by documenting learnings and helping shape early sales process Close early lighthouse customers and build momentum for the product launch Our take Excel represents an essential tool used by finance professionals every day. According to LiveFlow, even though Excel was widely used in finance for the past 30 years, it's a standard tool that did not improve in time, thus it failed to adapt to the increasingly complex needs of finance professionals. The company aims to solve this problem by creating a modern Financial Management tool that aims to serve the needs of modern finance teams. The founders first came up with the idea for LiveFlow after co-founder, Lasse, went bankrupt running his first business. Aiming to stop any other business having the same fate, LiveFlow was launched to ensure that clients have access to all of their financial information in one place. The company differentiates itself through its proprietary technology that allows spreadsheets to automatically connect to the real-time data of users from Google Sheets, banks, and accounting platforms. LiveFlow already counts Nova Credit, Unfurl, Gorgias, and Olaf among its clients. Having closed a seed round in 2022, it continues to build a strong customer base and has seen many recent expansions. Kirsty Company Specialist at Welcome to the Jungle Company Funding (last 2 of 4 rounds) Sep 2024 $13.5m SERIES A Oct 2022 $3.8m SEED Total funding: $21m Company HQ Flatiron District, New York, NY Leadership Anita Koimur (Co-Founder & COO) Before starting LiveFlow, they were in charge of Business Development at Revolut Rewards.  They led the product rollout to 13 markets across EMEA, US, and APAC. Lasse Kalkar (Co-Founder & CEO) They were the Head of Growth, Nordics at Revolut where they led Growth and Market launches in the Nordics. They also built a VC-backed robo-advisory investment app. Evan O'Brien (Co-Founder & CTO) They were a Staff Software Engineer at WebSummit and built the whole WebSummit Virtual platform within 3 months of 2020 that hosted 50,000 live users. Salary benchmarks We don't have enough data yet to provide salary benchmarks for this role. Submit your salary to help other candidates with crowdsourced salary estimates. title: Founding Account Executive
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive | Early-Stage Digital Health | UK


An exceptional opportunity to join a high-growth digital health startup at launch stage as its first commercial hire, owning early revenue and helping shape the commercial engine from day one.

The platform goes live in just a few weeks, early pilot customers are already delivering excellent feedback, and the business is now hiring its Founding AE to drive customer acquisition, build strategic partnerships, and create the foundations for scalable growth.


Founded by an internationally recognised doctor with a social audience of 5M+, the company has the credibility, visibility, and momentum to scale quickly.


Launching first through B2B partnerships in the employee wellbeing space, the long-term vision is to build a major B2C digital health platform — making this a rare opportunity for a commercially driven seller to make a real impact at the earliest stage.


We’re looking for someone who has:

  • Experience selling a software platform, SaaS product, or app in an early-stage environment
  • A background in employee benefits, wellbeing, digital health, or HealthTech
  • Strong outbound sales and pipeline-building capability
  • The ability to build relationships, close early customers, and create repeatable sales processes
  • A hands-on mindset suited to a fast-moving startup environment
  • The ambition to grow with the business and help build the future commercial team


Why join?

  • Be the first sales hire in a business with strong early traction
  • Take ownership of revenue generation at launch stage
  • Help define the sales motion, messaging, and customer acquisition strategy
  • Work directly with a high-profile founder
  • Build something with huge long-term potential, with significant scope for career growth as the company scales

title: Founding AE
descriptionhtml:
Founding AE – Hypergrowth SaaS Start-up


Dublin | 5 days on-site | Equity included


We’re partnering with one of the fastest-growing SaaS start-up companies in Dublin right now. They're growing rapidly and are now looking to hire a Founding AE who wants to be part of something that is genuinely going to the moon.


This isn’t a role for someone who wants to sit in a big, structured sales org. It’s for someone who wants autonomy, ownership, and the chance to be part of a company that could become a real success story in the Dublin tech scene over the next few years.


The role

  • Own the full sales cycle from discovery through to close
  • Sell into mid-market customers across multiple industries
  • Work closely with the founders and leadership team
  • Help shape the sales process as the company scales
  • Take full ownership of pipeline and performance
  • Operate in a fast-moving, high-autonomy environment


What they’re looking for (essential)

  • 3–5 years of closing experience in a SaaS sales role
  • Currently or previously carrying a 7-figure annual quota
  • Ideally Start up/Scale up experience
  • Can commit to 5 days on site in Dublin City Centre
  • Someone who is comfortable working in a fast-growth start-up
  • Self-sufficient, driven, and comfortable with ownership
  • High energy, ambitious, and wants to be part of a company that’s going places


Why this role stands out

  • Join early in what is expected to be a hypergrowth journey
  • Real autonomy – not a heavily micromanaged environment
  • Equity included as part of the package
  • Opportunity to grow with the company as it scales
  • Be part of a company that is aiming to become one of the standout start-ups in Dublin


Contact james.slein@adamantinehq.com for more information.

description_text: Aircall - Founding Account Executive, New AI product, German market Founding Account Executive, New AI product, German market Paris Office Sales & Partnerships – 12001 - Account Executives / Permanent Full Time Employee / Hybrid apply for this job Aircall is a unicorn, AI-powered customer communications platform used by 22,000+ companies worldwide to drive revenue, resolve issues faster, and scale customer-facing teams. We’re redefining customer communications by bringing voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and AI together into one seamless workspace. Our momentum comes from a simple idea: help teams work smarter, not harder. Aircall’s AI Voice Agent automates routine calls, AI Assist streamlines post-call work, and AI Assist Pro delivers real-time guidance so people can do their best work. The result is higher revenue, faster resolutions, and teams that scale with confidence. Aircall is headquartered in Paris, our European HQ, with a strong North American presence anchored in Seattle, our North American HQ, and teams across Madrid, London, Berlin, San Francisco, New York City, Sydney, and Mexico City. We’ve built a product customers love and a business that’s scaling quickly, backed by world-class investors and driven by rapid AI innovation across multiple product lines. At Aircall, you’ll join a company in motion. We’re ambitious, product-driven, and execution-focused, with visible impact, fast decisions, and real growth. How we work at Aircall: We’re customer-obsessed, data-driven, and focused on delivering meaningful outcomes. We value ownership, continuous learning, and thoughtful speed. If you thrive in a collaborative, fast-moving environment where trust and impact matter, you’ll feel at home here. Aircall is a unicorn, AI-powered customer communications platform, but we aren't stopping there. We are building a brand-new, standalone AI product designed to revolutionize pipeline management and sales efficiency with the power of generative AI . We are looking for two EMEA Founding Account Executives to join this "startup within a startup." This is not a traditional AE role. You will be the first boots on the ground for this product in EMEA. You will build the machine from scratch—from cold outreach and lead generation to closing and defining our new early-stage sales playbooks. You will own the German market fully. Key Responsibilities: Full-Cycle Ownership: Own the entire sales funnel. You will hunt, prospect, qualify, and close your own deals. Market Expansion: Drive the launch across EMEA. As one of our first hires, you will specifically focus on the German market but also contribute to growing the rest of Europe. Co-create the Playbook: Work directly with Product and Leadership to refine our value proposition. You’ll be selling a product that is evolving in real-time. Evangelize AI: Educate the market on our new AI product, moving beyond "features" to sell a vision of the future of work. Qualifications: The Builder Mindset : You have proven of experience in SaaS sales, ideally within a founding or early-stage environment (Series A or earlier). Selling to sales leaders is a plus. Outbound DNA : You are a prospector at heart. You aren’t afraid to pick up the phone or craft a creative cold-outreach strategy. Linguistic Excellence: Native in German and Full fluency in English. Adaptability: You thrive in ambiguity. You prefer a "blank slate" to a rigid corporate process. Tech stack: You know your way around key CRMs (Hubspot, Salesforce) but you’re also comfortable leveraging the new wave of AI tools supporting sales reps Closing Grit: A proven track record of hitting and exceeding quotas in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.
